projects.title: Looking Glass
projects.description: An internal tool that summarizes long Slack threads into concise action items using Claude. Reduced meeting follow-up time by 40% across the product team.
projects.aiAgentArch: Single summarization agent with a structured output prompt. Input: raw thread JSON. Output: JSON with summary, action items, and owners. Deployed as a Slack slash command.
outcomes: Reduced post-meeting follow-up time by ~40%
Adopted by 3 internal teams within 2 weeks of launch
Average summary generated in under 4 seconds

projects.title: Onsite Trip Planner
projects.description: A RAG-powered chatbot that answers questions about internal product documentation. Eliminated repetitive questions to the product team by 60%.
projects.aiAgentArch: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline: documents chunked and embedded into Pinecone, retrieved on query, passed to GPT-4 for synthesis with source citations.
outcomes: Reduced repetitive documentation questions by ~60%
Indexed 200+ internal documents at launch
Response accuracy rated 4.2/5 by internal users

projects.title: [Placeholder] Project
projects.description: A tool that auto-generates weekly sprint reports from Jira data using AI, formatted for executive stakeholders.
outcomes: Saved 2 hours per sprint cycle in report preparation
Adopted by 2 engineering teams
Stakeholder satisfaction with report clarity improved

projects.title: AI Onboarding Engine
projects.description: A production SaaS tool that helps product managers write PRDs, user stories, and release notes using AI. Launched to 200+ beta users.
projects.aiAgentArch: Multi-mode agent with specialized prompts per document type (PRD, user story, release note). Context-aware — feeds in the user's previous documents to maintain voice consistency.
outcomes: 200+ beta users in first 30 days
4.7/5 average user rating
Reduced PRD drafting time from ~3 hours to ~45 minutes

projects.title: Popmenu AI Assistant
projects.description: A production tool that ingests customer support tickets and reviews, clusters them by theme, and surfaces prioritized product insights.
projects.aiAgentArch: Two-agent pipeline: (1) Classifier agent tags each ticket with category and sentiment. (2) Synthesis agent groups clusters and generates a prioritized insight report with recommended actions.
outcomes: Processed 10,000+ tickets at launch
Reduced time-to-insight from 5 days to 4 hours
Identified 3 critical product bugs missed by manual review

projects.title: [Placeholder] Project
projects.description: An in-app AI assistant that guides new users through product setup with personalized step-by-step prompts based on their use case.
outcomes: Improved 7-day activation rate by 28%
Reduced support tickets from new users by 35%
Average time-to-first-value dropped from 12 minutes to 5 minutes

projects.title: PricePilot
projects.description: A capstone project exploring multi-agent orchestration patterns. Built a framework for chaining specialized agents with handoff protocols and failure recovery.
projects.aiAgentArch: LangGraph-based orchestrator managing 4 specialized agents: Research, Drafting, Review, and Formatting. Each agent has defined input/output contracts. Supervisor agent handles routing and retry logic on failure.
outcomes: Completed as part of AI PM certification program
Framework open-sourced with 40+ GitHub stars
Published a writeup on Substack covering the architecture decisions

projects.title: Resy Passport
projects.description: A learning project building a systematic evaluation toolkit for RAG pipelines — measuring retrieval quality, answer faithfulness, and hallucination rate.
outcomes: Evaluated 3 different chunking strategies across a 500-document corpus
Documented findings in a public Substack post
Toolkit used in subsequent production RAG build

projects.title: RunScene AI
projects.description: Completed a structured AI PM certification covering LLM fundamentals, prompt engineering, AI product strategy, and responsible AI practices.
outcomes: Completed 8 hands-on project modules
Final capstone project scored in the top 10% of cohort
Applied learnings directly to 3 subsequent production builds
